problem id: 05ca617c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01111111 -> 10111111
  01011101 -> 11101111
  01001111 -> 11100111
  01100001 -> 10111101
  10001011 -> 01101101
  01111100 -> 00111111
  10111001 -> 01011100
  01010000 -> 01111111

query: 10010010
predicted answer: 11011011
